state.output:
commit 2be2cdf3a123e231b16f766aa0e27d56b4606535
Author: Mihai Maruseac <mihaimaruseac@google.com>
Date:   Mon Apr 19 18:13:04 2021 -0700

    Prevent yet another division by zero
    
    PiperOrigin-RevId: 369343977
    Change-Id: I1a60da4cf512e60fd91e069c16e026544632fe7f

 tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h | 5 +++++
 1 file changed, 5 insertions(+)
This commit shows that there is a high probability that this code is new, so the corresponding code segment cannot be found in the old version.
You can call `viewcode` and `locate_symbol` to further check the results step by step. For newly introduced code, we consider that this hunk `need not ported`.

part.text: The target 2.5.0 code has the same vulnerable `shard_size` calculation immediately after `use_parallel_contraction`; I’m validating a direct insertion of the zero-work-unit guard before editing.

input.patch:
diff --git a/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h b/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h
--- a/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h
+++ b/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h
@@ -648,6 +648,11 @@ class Conv2DCustomBackpropInputOp : public OpKernel {
         dims.batch_size == 1 ||
         thread_work_unit_size >= min_thread_work_unit_size;
 
+    OP_REQUIRES(
+        context, work_unit_size > 0,
+        errors::InvalidArgument("input, filter_sizes and out_backprop tensors "
+                                "must all have at least 1 element"));
+
     const size_t shard_size =
         use_parallel_contraction
             ? 1

part.text: The hunk applies cleanly to the target base. I’m applying that same minimal guard to `tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h`.

metadata.diff:
Index: C:\1 Disk D\Research\FYP\backport-testing-codex2\.opencode-backport-worktrees\row-0161-95b2a30626d5\tensorflow\core\kernels\conv_grad_input_ops.h
===================================================================
--- C:\1 Disk D\Research\FYP\backport-testing-codex2\.opencode-backport-worktrees\row-0161-95b2a30626d5\tensorflow\core\kernels\conv_grad_input_ops.h
+++ C:\1 Disk D\Research\FYP\backport-testing-codex2\.opencode-backport-worktrees\row-0161-95b2a30626d5\tensorflow\core\kernels\conv_grad_input_ops.h
@@ -644,15 +644,20 @@
 // Otherwise, revert to multiple single-threaded matmul ops running in
 // parallel to keep all threads busy.
 // TODO(andydavis) Explore alternatives to branching the code in this way
 // (i.e. run multiple, parallel tensor contractions in another thread pool).
-const bool use_parallel_contraction =
-    dims.batch_size == 1 ||
-    thread_work_unit_size >= min_thread_work_unit_size;
-
-const size_t shard_size =
-    use_parallel_contraction
-        ? 1
+const bool use_parallel_contraction =
+    dims.batch_size == 1 ||
+    thread_work_unit_size >= min_thread_work_unit_size;
+
+OP_REQUIRES(
+    context, work_unit_size > 0,
+    errors::InvalidArgument("input, filter_sizes and out_backprop tensors "
+                            "must all have at least 1 element"));
+
+const size_t shard_size =
+    use_parallel_contraction
+        ? 1
         : (target_working_set_size + work_unit_size - 1) / work_unit_size;
 
 Tensor col_buffer;
 OP_REQUIRES_OK(context,

part.text:
```yaml
backport_result:
  status: success
  patch: |
    diff --git a/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h b/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h
    index b5059c479e..3d3a44390b 100644
    --- a/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h
    +++ b/tensorflow/core/kernels/conv_grad_input_ops.h
    @@ -649,6 +649,11 @@ class Conv2DCustomBackpropInputOp : public OpKernel {
             dims.batch_size == 1 ||
             thread_work_unit_size >= min_thread_work_unit_size;
     
    +    OP_REQUIRES(
    +        context, work_unit_size > 0,
    +        errors::InvalidArgument("input, filter_sizes and out_backprop tensors "
    +                                "must all have at least 1 element"));
    +
         const size_t shard_size =
             use_parallel_contraction
                 ? 1
  notes: >
    Added the Conv2D backprop input work_unit_size validation before shard_size calculation to prevent division by zero.
```
